full_text:
Zhang Nan (Wenjin) 張南 (文進)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Nan (張南), styledWenjin (文進). Commander of the vanguard against Wu, killed in the defeat that followed. Zhang Nan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Zhang Nan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
